response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the verses and bridge of 'Hitori', but the JSON's chorus is for the wrong song (the DEEN version) instead of the Mika Nakashima version being performed. I have ignored the incorrect JSON chorus and transcribed the correct lyrics from the audio. I have discarded the leftover lyrics from the JSON that were not performed. The Indonesian song 'Lagu Tanpa Huruf R' matches the JSON except for the singer's name substitution ('Iofife' for 'Nadya'). Text alignment strictly follows the audio waveform without early cutoffs or cross-pause merging.

subtitles.original: ヒトリ
subtitles.english: Hitori (Alone)

subtitles.original: あなたなら 私のすべて
subtitles.english: If it's you, you're my everything...

subtitles.original: わかってくれる気がした
subtitles.english: ...I felt like you'd understand me.

subtitles.original: あなたを愛しすぎてしまう前に
subtitles.english: Before I end up loving you too much...

subtitles.original: あなたをすべて知る前に
subtitles.english: ...before I come to know everything about you.

subtitles.original: 空に願う どうか未来があるように
subtitles.english: I pray to the sky, that there will be a future somehow.

subtitles.original: 今はそう 独り泣いてるの
subtitles.english: Right now, yes, I'm crying alone.

subtitles.original: 小さな私の手に
subtitles.english: In my small hands...

subtitles.original: 重ねた あなたの大きな手
subtitles.english: ...lay your large hands, overlapping mine.

subtitles.original: 失いたくないと願うほど
subtitles.english: The more I pray not to lose you...

subtitles.original: 苦しくなっていたの
subtitles.english: ...the more painful it became.

subtitles.original: 唇についた 真っ赤な愛が
subtitles.english: The crimson love upon my lips...

subtitles.original: 消える前に あなたに会いたくて
subtitles.english: ...before it fades, I wanted to see you.

subtitles.original: 目を閉じると 巻き戻される
subtitles.english: When I close my eyes, I'm taken back...

subtitles.original: 最後の温かい夜
subtitles.english: ...to that last warm night.

subtitles.original: 優しいその目と 優しさと
subtitles.english: Those kind eyes and that kindness...

subtitles.original: 言葉すべて 嘘じゃないと言いかせて
subtitles.english: ...tell me that all those words weren't lies.

subtitles.original: これで最後の恋だと思うの
subtitles.english: I think this will be my last love.

subtitles.original: だから繋ぎ止めていたかったのに
subtitles.english: That's why I wanted to hold on to you, and yet...

subtitles.original: もうすべてわかってるから
subtitles.english: Since I've understood everything now...

subtitles.original: もう私に近寄らないでよ
subtitles.english: Don't get close to me anymore.

subtitles.original: 果てしないこの 苦しみまでも愛せるほど
subtitles.english: I can love even the suffering of this endless child...

subtitles.original: 強い人はいないから
subtitles.english: ...because there is no one as strong as you.

subtitles.original: あなたを愛しているから
subtitles.english: Because I love you...

subtitles.original: ずっとあなたが私を忘れるまで
subtitles.english: ...until you forget me forever.

subtitles.original: 星に願う どうか叶えて
subtitles.english: I wish upon the stars, please make it come true...

subtitles.original: ずっと私のそばにいてほしい
subtitles.english: ...that I want you to be by my side forever.

subtitles.original: あなたを愛しすぎてしまう前に
subtitles.english: Before I end up loving you too much...

subtitles.original: あなたをすべて知る前に
subtitles.english: ...before I come to know everything about you.

subtitles.original: 空に願う どうか未来があるように
subtitles.english: I pray to the sky, that there will be a future somehow.

subtitles.original: 今はそう 独り泣いてるの
subtitles.english: Right now, yes, I'm crying alone.

subtitles.original: 今もそう 独り泣いてるの
subtitles.english: Even now, yes, I'm crying alone.

subtitles.original: 独りでいる この孤独が
subtitles.english: When I was by myself, this loneliness...

subtitles.original: いつから笑顔を振りまくことに慣れていた？
subtitles.english: ...from when did I get used to putting on a smile?

subtitles.original:
Lagu Tanpa Huruf R
Lyrics, Music: Nadya Fatira
subtitles.english:
Song Without the Letter R
Lyrics, Music: Nadya Fatira

subtitles.original: *Tidak ada huruf R dalam lirik lagu
subtitles.english: *There is no letter 'R' in the song lyrics

subtitles.original: Ini kisahnya anak manusia
subtitles.english: This is the story of a human child

subtitles.original: Kau bisa memanggilnya dengan nama Iofife
subtitles.english: You can call her by the name Iofife

subtitles.original: Sebuah konsonan yang menyulitkan
subtitles.english: A difficult consonant

subtitles.original: Membuat lidahnya bosan tak bisa ucapkan
subtitles.english: Making her tongue tired, unable to pronounce it

subtitles.original: Dia coba pahami setiap manusia
subtitles.english: She tries to understand every human

subtitles.original: Punya hebat punya cacat
subtitles.english: Has strengths and has flaws
